title: secretx-cache: conditional WriteableSecretStore impl for CachingStore
description: Move the put body out of 'impl<S: SecretStore> SecretStore for CachingStore<S>' into a new '#[async_trait::async_trait] impl<S: WriteableSecretStore> WriteableSecretStore for CachingStore<S>'. The write-through ordering must be preserved exactly: inner.put first, cache update only on success. Update FakeStore in tests to implement WriteableSecretStore (add a separate impl WriteableSecretStore for FakeStore block; remove put from impl SecretStore for FakeStore). The put_populates_cache test must still pass unchanged.
